# Game libraries to build (one folder per line). build-game-libs.py looks each
# folder up in game-libs-catalog.json to find its hlsdk-portable branch, then
# builds + installs into <OUT>/<folder>/{dlls,cl_dlls} (the package staging tree
# /out in the dist container, or ./dist-test/ for a local host build).
#
#   - blank lines and # comments are ignored
#   - a folder must exist in the catalog (run: build-game-libs.py catalog)
#   - to pick a non-default branch for a folder, write  folder=branch
#       e.g.  gearbox=opforfixed   (instead of the default opfor)
#   - asset/map-only mods (dayone, uplink, darkstar, ...) need NO line — they run
#     on valve's hl_<arch> lib, not their own game code.

valve
gearbox
bshift
hunger

# more classic mods (uncomment once their assets are installed):
# poke646
# spirit          # sohl1.2
# asheep
